content: I'll decompose this scenario into two focused subtasks: one to implement the health check endpoint and one to add tests and update the monitoring configuration.

function.name: decompose_task
function.arguments: {"goal":"Implement /healthz endpoint and integrate with monitoring","nodes":[{"id":"implement-health","prompt":"Create api/health.go with a HealthHandler that responds to GET /healthz with HTTP 200 and JSON body {\"status\": \"ok\"}. Register the /healthz route on the existing server router in api/server.go.","role":"developer","depends_on":[],"file_scope":["api/health.go","api/server.go"]},{"id":"add-tests","prompt":"Write Go tests in api/health_test.go that verify the /healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with the correct JSON payload. Update monitoring/config.yaml to add /healthz as a scrape target with a 30-second interval.","role":"developer","depends_on":["implement-health"],"file_scope":["api/health_test.go","monitoring/config.yaml"]}]}
